title: Ireland Personal Public Service (PPS) Number Application
description: Apply for a Personal Public Service (PPS) Number, the identifier an individual needs to interact with Irish social welfare, tax, health, education, and other public services. This document models the standard adult (18+) self-application, covering both the online channel (MyWelfare, requiring a MyGovID account) and the paper REG1 form used for postal and third-party applications, for applicants resident on the island of Ireland and applicants resident abroad. A PPS Number issued automatically at Irish birth registration, a child (under-18) application on Form REGM1, and a third party's own submission workflow are out of scope for this document. It does not submit the application; the live gov.ie source is always authoritative (see VERIFICATION.md).

verification.notes: Source-derived reference schema authored from the gov.ie 'Get a Personal Public Service (PPS) Number' page (which supersedes the previously catalogued 'how-to-apply-for-a-personal-public-service-pps-number' URL — that path now 404s and has been corrected here and in discovery/catalog.json) and Form REG1 (edition 00K 04-22, April 2022), extracted directly from the REG1 PDF's text streams. Application channel (online via MyWelfare/MyGovID vs. postal/third-party via REG1), residency branching (resident on the island of Ireland vs. resident abroad), the REG1 item set (items 1-19 across its two pages), the identity-evidence categories by citizenship basis, and the 'reason for application' options were all confirmed against the source. Status remains 'draft'. See VERIFICATION.md.

fields.name: applicationChannel
fields.label: How will you apply?
fields.description: online = apply through MyWelfare using a basic or verified MyGovID account, available to applicants resident on the island of Ireland and applicants resident abroad; by_post = complete and post Form REG1 to the Department of Social Protection, Shannon Lodge, Carrick on Shannon, Leitrim, N41 KD81 — the channel used for third-party (solicitor, accountant, employer) applications and where MyGovID is not available.

fields.name: residency
fields.label: Where do you live?
fields.description: resident_in_ireland = resident on the island of Ireland; resident_outside_ireland = resident abroad and applying to interact with an Irish state agency (e.g. Revenue). Determines whether the overseas questionnaire and third-party consent form are required.
fields.sourceRef: How to Apply / Applying for a PPS Number if you are living outside Ireland

fields.name: title
fields.label: Title
fields.description: mr, mrs, ms, or other (specify in titleOther).
fields.sourceRef: REG1 item 1 — Title, insert an X or specify

fields.name: titleOther
fields.label: Title, if 'other'
fields.description: Required only when title is 'other'.
fields.sourceRef: REG1 item 1 — Title, insert an X or specify

fields.name: surname
fields.label: Surname
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data.

fields.name: firstNames
fields.label: First names
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data.

fields.name: birthFirstNames
fields.label: First names at birth (if different)
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data. Required only if your first names at birth differ from your current first names.

fields.name: birthSurname
fields.label: Surname at birth (if different)
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data. Required only if your surname at birth differs from your current surname.

fields.name: mothersBirthSurname
fields.label: Mother's birth surname
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data. Used as an identity-verification question.

fields.name: dateOfBirth
fields.label: Date of birth
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data.

fields.name: gender
fields.label: Gender
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data. The REG1 form (edition 00K 04-22) offers only male/female.

fields.name: addressLine1
fields.label: Address — line 1
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data.

fields.name: addressLine2
fields.label: Address — line 2 (optional)
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data.

fields.name: addressTown
fields.label: Address — town or city
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data.

fields.name: addressCounty
fields.label: Address — county
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data. Applies to Irish addresses; leave blank for a non-Irish address.

fields.name: eircode
fields.label: Eircode
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data. Irish routing-key postcode, e.g. 'D02 AF30'. Applies to Irish addresses only.

fields.name: addressCountry
fields.label: Address — country
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data. Required for both Irish and overseas addresses.

fields.name: mobilePhone
fields.label: Mobile telephone number
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data. International format recommended, e.g. +353851234567.

fields.name: landlinePhone
fields.label: Landline telephone number
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data.

fields.name: email
fields.label: Email address
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data. Required in practice for the online channel, where it is tied to the MyGovID account.

fields.name: reasonForApplication
fields.label: Why do you need a PPS Number?
fields.description: employment = to take up employment; driving_licence = to apply for or exchange a driver's licence; social_welfare_payment = to apply for a Social Welfare payment; register_birth_of_child = to register the birth of your child; safe_pass_training = to complete SAFE PASS training to work in construction; education_enrolment = to register for a course in a school or college; irish_passport_application = to apply for an Irish passport (if resident in the State); marriage_and_residence = you intend to marry and reside in the State after marriage; specified_body_service = to access a service from a Public (Specified) Body; other_public_service = to access another public service not listed; other = another reason, detailed in reasonOtherDetail.
fields.sourceRef: REG1 item 12 — Why do you need a Personal Public Service (PPS) Number?

fields.name: reasonOtherDetail
fields.label: Reason detail, if 'other'
fields.description: Required only when reasonForApplication is 'other'.
fields.sourceRef: REG1 item 12 — Why do you need a Personal Public Service (PPS) Number?

fields.name: nationality
fields.label: Nationality
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data.

fields.name: countryOfBirth
fields.label: Country you were born in
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data.
fields.sourceRef: REG1 item 14 — Country you were born in

fields.name: countyOfBirthInIreland
fields.label: If born in the Republic of Ireland, which county?
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data. Required only when countryOfBirth is Ireland.
fields.sourceRef: REG1 item 15 — If born in the Republic of Ireland, please state which county you were born in

fields.name: mostRecentPriorCountry
fields.label: Most recent country, before Ireland, where you were employed, educated, registered, or received a pension/benefit/allowance
fields.description: Applies only to applicants who lived elsewhere before Ireland.
fields.sourceRef: REG1 item 16 — Name of the most recent country, before the Republic of Ireland, in which you were employed, educated, registered or from which you were receiving a pension, benefit payment or allowance

fields.name: mostRecentPriorCountryIdentifier
fields.label: Social security, personal, or registration number in that country
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data. Required only when mostRecentPriorCountry is provided.
fields.sourceRef: REG1 item 17 — Social security, personal or registration number in that country

fields.name: irishNationalInsuranceNumberPre1979
fields.label: Irish National Insurance Number (if you lived or worked in the Republic of Ireland up to 1979)
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data. Legacy identifier predating the PPS Number system.
fields.sourceRef: REG1 item 18 — If you lived or worked in the Republic of Ireland up to 1979, please state your Irish National Insurance Number

fields.name: previousIrishAddress
fields.label: Previous address in Ireland
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data. Required only if you previously lived in Ireland.
fields.sourceRef: REG1 item 19 — If you previously lived in Ireland, please state your address

fields.name: identityBasis
fields.label: Which identity-evidence category applies to you?
fields.description: irish_citizen_born_in_ireland; irish_citizen_born_in_northern_ireland_or_uk; irish_citizen_by_naturalisation; irish_citizen_by_foreign_birth_registration; eu_eea_citizen_other (EU/EEA citizen other than Irish/UK); non_eu_eea_citizen. Determines which document(s) satisfy identityDocument.

fields.name: identityDocument
fields.label: Proof of identity (document)
fields.description: The accepted document depends on identityBasis: irish_citizen_born_in_ireland = current Irish passport, or current Irish/UK driving licence or Irish learner permit (checked against General Register Office birth records; a birth certificate is requested only if no record is found); irish_citizen_born_in_northern_ireland_or_uk = current passport, or birth certificate plus a current full driving licence or Irish learner permit; irish_citizen_by_naturalisation = current Irish passport or Certificate of Naturalisation bearing a photograph; irish_citizen_by_foreign_birth_registration = current Irish passport, or Foreign Birth Registration Certificate plus an Irish/UK driving licence or Irish learner permit; eu_eea_citizen_other = current passport or national identity card; non_eu_eea_citizen = current passport or 1951 travel document.

fields.name: addressEvidenceDocument
fields.label: Proof of address (document)
fields.description: A document showing your name and address, dated within the last 3 months: a household utility bill, an official letter or document, a bank statement, a property lease or tenancy agreement, an official letter from a government department or agency, or official third-party confirmation of address.

fields.name: reasonEvidenceDocument
fields.label: Evidence of why you need a PPS Number (document)
fields.description: Required for applicants resident outside Ireland (residency = resident_outside_ireland); recommended for others where the reason is not otherwise evident, e.g. a letter from an employer.
fields.sourceRef: Applying for a PPS Number if you are living outside Ireland

fields.name: overseasApplicantQuestionnaireDocument
fields.label: Completed overseas applicant questionnaire (Form RM2)
fields.description: Required when residency is resident_outside_ireland.
fields.sourceRef: Applying for a PPS Number if you are living outside Ireland — a completed questionnaire [RM2]

fields.name: authoriseThirdPartyToReceiveNumber
fields.label: Should the PPS Number be given to a third-party representative (e.g. solicitor or accountant)?
fields.description: Relevant mainly to applicants resident outside Ireland. If true, thirdPartyConsentDocument is required.
fields.sourceRef: Applying for a PPS Number if you are living outside Ireland — a consent form signed by you

fields.name: thirdPartyConsentDocument
fields.label: Signed third-party consent form (document)
fields.description: Required when authoriseThirdPartyToReceiveNumber is true.
fields.sourceRef: Applying for a PPS Number if you are living outside Ireland — a consent form signed by you
